title: Inspect trees for access and work
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Inspect trees for access and work demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare tree inspection requirements

pcs.text: Confirm access to site and location of tree
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm access to site and location of tree?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm access to site and location of tree.

pcs.text: Determine the scope of tree works required in consultation with client
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the scope of tree works required in consultation with client?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the scope of tree works required in consultation with client.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis and record and implement site-specific control measures according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis and record and implement site-specific control measures according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis and record and implement site-specific control measures according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Identify above and below ground services and determine limits of approach
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify above and below ground services and determine limits of approach?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify above and below ground services and determine limits of approach.

pcs.text: Confirm accessibility of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm accessibility of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm accessibility of first aid and emergency personnel, equipment and procedures.

pcs.text: Select, check and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, check and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, check and use personal protective equipment.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare tree inspection requirements

elements.title: Inspect tree and surrounds

pcs.text: Inspect tree for access and tree work methods
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Inspect tree for access and tree work methods?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Inspect tree for access and tree work methods.

pcs.text: Identify tree species and assess impact of tree characteristics on selection of access and work method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify tree species and assess impact of tree characteristics on selection of access and work method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify tree species and assess impact of tree characteristics on selection of access and work method.

pcs.text: Conduct a hazard evaluation of the tree and surrounds
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct a hazard evaluation of the tree and surrounds?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct a hazard evaluation of the tree and surrounds.

pcs.text: Conduct tests on tree components to determine integrity when visual inspection is insufficient
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct tests on tree components to determine integrity when visual inspection is insufficient?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct tests on tree components to determine integrity when visual inspection is insufficient.

pcs.text: Identify and assess presence of fauna habitat and other ecological impediments to tree access
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and assess presence of fauna habitat and other ecological impediments to tree access?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and assess presence of fauna habitat and other ecological impediments to tree access.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Inspect tree and surrounds

elements.title: Determine method of access and work method

pcs.text: Select tree access and tree work methods according to tree inspection results
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select tree access and tree work methods according to tree inspection results?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select tree access and tree work methods according to tree inspection results.

pcs.text: Review workplace health and safety hazards, risk assessment and planned controls for selected method of access and tree work method
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review workplace health and safety hazards, risk assessment and planned controls for selected method of access and tree work method?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review workplace health and safety hazards, risk assessment and planned controls for selected method of access and tree work method.

pcs.text: Implement additional control measures and adjust tree access and work methods according to site requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement additional control measures and adjust tree access and work methods according to site requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement additional control measures and adjust tree access and work methods according to site requirements.

pcs.text: Advise site work team of identified hazards and control measures to implement
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise site work team of identified hazards and control measures to implement?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise site work team of identified hazards and control measures to implement.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Determine method of access and work method

elements.title: Maintain records and advise stakeholders

pcs.text: Document control measures, tree access and work method according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document control measures, tree access and work method according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document control measures, tree access and work method according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Advise stakeholders where tree work is altered or rescheduled according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise stakeholders where tree work is altered or rescheduled according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise stakeholders where tree work is altered or rescheduled according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Maintain records and advise stakeholders
